title: release/20.x: [InstCombine] Do not fold logical is_finite test (#136851)
summary: The developers generalized an `fcmp ord` + `fcmp uge` pattern by decoupling it from specific FP operations (`copysign`/`fabs`) and supporting logical `select` forms. The key insight was recognizing that `stripSignOnlyFPOps` normalizes both operands to a common base value, enabling matching across varied sign-insensitive operations (`copysign`, `fabs`, or none). The patch conditionally applies the transform only to bitwise `and` (not logical `select`) to preserve safety, as logical `select` already benefits from earlier canonicalization to `and`. This approach demonstrates a reusable strategy: identify core value equivalence via helper functions, then extend matching to cover semantically equivalent variants while respecting operation-specific constraints.
